description: qmd-search quality regression set. Paths are examples from one bilingual Obsidian vault — copy this file and replace `expected_files` with paths from your own indexed collection (the canonical, qmd-normalized form: spaces become hyphens). Run with: qmd bench evals/fixture.example.json -c <collection>

queries.description: Exact keyword should hit the project trail note.
Intent query should surface coping/CBT notes, not just notes titled 'anxiety'.
Topical query should cluster the cross-species / animal-communication notes.
No shared words with the target PRD; tests semantic bridging.
Proper noun in native (Cyrillic) script — must reach the therapy/daily notes about the dog. Searching the Latin 'Ziggy' instead returns nothing relevant (the bilingual gotcha).
Russian query should bridge to relevant coping notes (EN or RU). Cross-lingual recall is topical, not exact-file-stable, so several valid targets are listed and only one need appear.
